en.name: Limbuško nabrežje
en.description: Testing the functioning of natural processes on the river playground and demonstrating their impact on life along the river and the consequences of our interventions in the area.

sl.name: Limbuško nabrežje
sl.description: Testiranje delovanja naravnih procesov na rečnem igrišču in demonstracija njihovega vpliva na življenje ob reki ter posledic naših posegov v prostor.

en.name: Miklavski potok
en.description: Awareness of why species conservation is important for human well-being.

sl.name: Miklavski potok
sl.description: Zavedanje, zakaj je ohranjanje vrst pomembno za človeško dobro počutje.

en.name: Duplek
en.description: A playful presentation of the river as a transporter of river material and creator of geo and biodiversity.

sl.name: Duplek
sl.description: Igrivo predstavitev reke kot prenašalke rečnega materiala in ustvarjalke geo in biotske raznovrstnosti.

en.name: Vurberg
en.description: Raising interest in learning about the Drava River bend and awareness that this was and may continue to be a habitat for beavers.

sl.name: Vurberg
sl.description: Zbujanje zanimanja za spoznavanje rečnega zavoja Drave in zavedanje, da je bil in lahko še naprej bo življenjski prostor bobrov.

en.name: Zlatolicje
en.description: Presentation of natural river processes and structures and presentation of possibilities for environmentally friendly management.

sl.name: Zlatolicje
sl.description: Predstavitev naravnih rečnih procesov in struktur ter predstavitev možnosti za okolju prijazno upravljanje.

en.name: Hajdina
en.description: The importance of traditional cultural landscapes, where humans have contributed to biodiversity through thoughtful management.

sl.name: Hajdina
sl.description: Pomen tradicionalnih kulturnih krajin, kjer je človek s premišljenim upravljanjem prispeval k biotski raznovrstnosti.

en.name: Ptuj
en.description: Presentation of the life of the Drava River and changes in the Drava River Corridor throughout history, promoting sustainable future use that will contribute to the preservation of habitats and species.

sl.name: Ptuj
sl.description: Predstavitev življenja reke Drave in sprememb v koridorju reke Drave skozi zgodovino, spodbujanje trajnostne prihodnje rabe, ki bo prispevala k ohranjanju habitatov in vrst.

en.name: Muretinci
en.description: Awareness of the importance of native animal species, using the example of the European pond turtle, and the problems that alien species can cause.

sl.name: Muretinci
sl.description: Zavedanje pomena avtohtone živalske vrste na primeru močvirske sklednice in problemov, ki jih lahko povzročajo tujerodne vrste.

en.name: Izliv Pesnice
en.description: Awareness of the presence of otters and the need for environmentally friendly management of passage between the Drava River and its tributaries.

sl.name: Izliv Pesnice
sl.description: Zavedanje prisotnosti vidre in potrebe po okolju prijaznem upravljanju prehodov med reko Dravo in njenimi pritoki.

en.name: Ormoške lagune
en.description: Experience the richness of life along the Drava River and the floodplain between Maribor and Središče ob Dravi. A preserved natural river has so much to offer us! How can we help preserve the river area?

sl.name: Ormoške lagune
sl.description: Doživite bogastvo življenja ob reki Dravi in poplavni ravnici med Mariborom in Središčem ob Dravi. Ohranjena naravna reka nam ponuja toliko! Kako lahko pomagamo ohraniti rečno območje?

en.name: Ormoške lagune
en.description: Presentation of bird habitats and species ecology – green snaketail (dragonfly), otter, beaver. An opportunity for sensory observation and learning about habitats and species and the relationships between them.

sl.name: Ormoške lagune
sl.description: Predstavitev habitatov ptic in ekologije vrst – zelena kačja pastirka (kačji pastir), vidra, bober. Priložnost za čutno opazovanje in učenje o habitatih in vrstah ter odnosih med njimi.

en.name: Središče ob Dravi
en.description: The connection between the place and the Drava River and the importance of the floodplain. The feeling of connection between the floodplain forest, species, and humans.

sl.name: Središče ob Dravi
sl.description: Povezava med krajem in reko Dravo ter pomen poplavne ravnice. Občutek povezanosti med poplavnim gozdom, vrstami in človekom.

en.name: Središče ob Dravi
en.description: The natural playground offers space for movement and learning about floodplain forests and plant and animal species along the river.

sl.name: Središče ob Dravi
sl.description: Naravno igrišče ponuja prostor za gibanje in učenje o poplavnih gozdovih ter rastlinskih in živalskih vrstah ob reki.
